commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ad4a1387819ecc2821d290d67b9e813ef2a38588)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes llm-core union coercion plus bundle-MCP materialization/tests to preserve schema-nullable nulls and filter top-level null MCP arguments before `callTool`.

PR surface: Source +93, Tests +114. Total +207 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run here. Source inspection shows current main validates MCP tool args before execution and can coerce `null` to `""`, while the reporter's real server evidence supports the failure mode.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the external PR still lacks real MCP proof, has a caller-order defect, and sits among sibling candidate fixes for the same bug.

target.title: fix(agents): strip null-valued optional args from MCP tool calls
target.author: maweibin
